title: Standardize docs on reStructuredText: convert the .md files under docs/ to .rst
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

Stefan 2026-06-20, re #1154: docs/ is a Sphinx tree but is a MIXED md/rst mess. RST: index.rst, Papers.rst, developers/JS-Instrument.rst. Markdown (pre-existing + #1154 added more): Configuration.md, Using_OpenWPM.md, Architecture-Internals.md, Platform-Architecture.md, Schema-Documentation.md, Release-Checklist.md, developers/Stealth-Instrumentation.md, developers/Stealth-Requirements.md. Unless myst-parser is enabled in conf.py the .md files do not render in the Sphinx build at all. Stefan prefers rst. Task: convert the .md docs to .rst, wire them into the index toctree, verify the docs build. #1154 just added to the sprawl; fixing the whole set is the real cleanup.
